content: Hello everyone  im new at the game and for some reason it won't change my language to English
Here's a great one made by <@212031841786527764>.

Yes, it's a known problem that they're working to fix. Somehow the recent update messed with the translation and so now it's not fully in English. They'll most likely announce it once the issue has been solved.
Any idea how long this will take?
I got no clue to be honest. I doubt it'll be a long time though, probably a couple days at most. If you are able to, you can download it on steam and the translation works on there.
